nasb.text: When He came to the house, He did not allow anyone to enter with Him, except Peter and John and James, and the girl’s father and mother.

esv.text: And when he came to the house, he allowed no one to enter with him, except Peter and John and James, and the father and mother of the child.

cnv.text: 到了那家，除了彼得、約翰、雅各和女孩的父母以外，他不准任何人同他進屋裡去。

ccb.text: 到了雅鲁家，耶稣只准彼得、雅各、约翰和雅鲁夫妇跟祂进去。

csbs.text: 耶稣来到他的家，除了彼得、约翰、雅各和孩子的父母以外，不准任何人与他一起进去。
